text: Five declassified intelligence files from SRI, SIE, the Foreign Ministry and the Special Telecommunications Service concluded that Georgescu's rise was not a natural outcome but the result of a coordinated social media campaign most likely orchestrated by a state actor. A previously hidden network mainly operating on TikTok which had been largely inactive since its launch in 2016 was activated two weeks before the elections. Operators were recruited and coordinated through a Telegram channel using methods typical of a state actor's mode of operation.
